steps.title: Find the key contrast clue
steps.content: The notes list the thickness of each fiber: TPU is 3 mm thick, SEBS is 4 mm thick.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
Check each choice against the goal — contrast means showing a difference between the two samples:
  • A — describes torsional heating in general; mentions neither sample specifically.
  • B — names both samples but describes only what the study did, not how they differed.
  • C — mentions both samples but says both temperatures rose — that's a similarity, not a contrast.
  • D — states that the SEBS rubber sample (4 mm) was thicker than the TPU sample (3 mm), directly showing a measurable difference between the two.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
